tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Always Something There To Remind Me

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]F/G[/ch]
     Sometimes a love won't let go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]A7/C#[/ch]
     Hard as I try I know it shows[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]A7/C#[/ch]
   Everybody's telling me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                    [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]A7/C#[/ch]
   You'll be over her eventually[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]      [ch]Bm7b5[/ch]          [ch]E7#5#9[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]A9sus[/ch]  [ch]A7[/ch]
   But how am I supposed to feel so secure[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
When I keep wonderin' who's holding Donna now[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]A/G[/ch]       [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
And I keep wonderin' who's heart she's knocking around[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]A7[/ch]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]F6[/ch]  [ch]A9sus[/ch]  [ch]A7[/ch]
There's nothing I wouldn't do to be in her shoes somehow[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
When I keep wonderin' who's holding Donna now[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                [ch]A/G[/ch]    [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
And I keep wonderin' what magic can be found[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]A7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]A7[/ch]    [ch]Fadd9[/ch]  [ch]G7sus[/ch]
To turn me back to the one who's holding Donna now[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]F/G[/ch]
     The letter started with goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]F/G[/ch]
     I've read it half a million times[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]A7/C#[/ch]
   Tell me this is just a dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                         [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]A7/C#[/ch]
   When I wake up she'll be here next to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]       [ch]Bm7b5[/ch]  [ch]E7#5#9[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]A9sus[/ch]  [ch]A7[/ch]
   Tell me it will be just the way    it        was, ohh[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
When I keep wonderin' who's holding Donna now[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]A/G[/ch]       [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
And I keep wonderin' who's heart she's knocking around[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]A7[/ch]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]F6[/ch]  [ch]A9sus[/ch]  [ch]A7[/ch]

When I keep wonderin' who's holding Donna now[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                [ch]A/G[/ch]    [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
And I keep wonderin' what magic can be found[/tab]
